name: SkyHawk Pro X
shortDescription: Professional 4K/60fps camera drone with 3-axis gimbal and 45-min flight time.
description: The SkyHawk Pro X is our flagship camera drone, featuring a 1-inch CMOS sensor, 4K/60fps recording, 3-axis mechanical gimbal, and intelligent flight modes including waypoint navigation and ActiveTrack 5.0.

name: Nimbus Mini
shortDescription: Ultra-compact 4K drone under 249g — no registration required.
description: The Nimbus Mini packs a 4K camera and 3-axis gimbal into a foldable frame weighing just 249g. Perfect for travel photographers who want cinema-quality footage anywhere.

name: CineHawk 8K
shortDescription: Cinema-grade 8K drone with Hasselblad optics and omnidirectional obstacle sensing.
description: Purpose-built for professional filmmakers. The CineHawk 8K features a Hasselblad camera with 8K/25fps and 4K/120fps capabilities, 12.8 stops of dynamic range, and omnidirectional obstacle avoidance.

name: Phantom Racer V2
shortDescription: Competition-grade FPV racing quad with sub-ms latency and 160mph top speed.
description: Born from championship DNA, the Phantom Racer V2 delivers blistering speed with sub-millisecond control latency. Carbon fiber unibody frame, 2806.5 motors, and tuned PID profiles for instant response.

name: TerraScout Industrial
shortDescription: Enterprise survey drone with LiDAR, thermal imaging, and RTK positioning.
description: The TerraScout is built for demanding industrial applications. Equipped with LiDAR scanning, thermal camera, RTK centimeter-precision positioning, and IP45 weather resistance for year-round operations.

name: CadetWing Trainer
shortDescription: Beginner-friendly drone with GPS return-to-home and auto-hover.
description: Perfect first drone with safety features like auto-hover, GPS return-to-home, and geofencing. 2K camera for learning aerial photography with training wheels you can turn off as skills grow.

name: VelocityX FPV
shortDescription: Entry-level FPV racing drone with HD digital video transmission.
description: Step into FPV racing with digital HD video feed, durable crash-resistant frame, and pre-tuned flight controller. Perfect for pilots transitioning from camera drones to racing.

name: AgriSpray Pro
shortDescription: Agricultural spraying drone with 20L tank and terrain-following radar.
description: Cover up to 40 acres per hour with precision variable-rate spraying. Terrain-following radar maintains consistent altitude over uneven ground. Supports multiple spray patterns.

name: AeroVolt 2806.5 Motors (4-Pack)
shortDescription: High-performance 2806.5 2450KV brushless motors for 5" racing quads.
description: Competition-proven motors with titanium shaft, N52H magnets, and Japanese NSK bearings. Optimized for 5-inch propellers on 6S power systems.

name: StrikeFrame 5" Carbon Frame
shortDescription: True-X 5" carbon fiber racing frame with replaceable arms.
description: 3K carbon fiber construction with 5mm arms designed for crash survivability. Replaceable arm design means you swap one arm instead of the whole frame.

name: NexusFC Flight Controller
shortDescription: F7 flight controller with Betaflight support and barometer.
description: STM32F722 processor, ICM42688P gyro, built-in barometer, and onboard blackbox storage. Supports Betaflight, iNav, and KISS firmware.

name: Endurance 6S 1500mAh LiPo
shortDescription: High-discharge 6S 1500mAh 120C LiPo battery for racing drones.
description: Premium lithium polymer cells with consistent voltage delivery through aggressive maneuvers. XT60 connector, balance lead included.

name: Stealth Tri-Blade Props (8-Pack)
shortDescription: Ultra-quiet tri-blade propellers for reduced noise and better efficiency.
description: Aerodynamically optimized 3-blade design reduces noise by 40% compared to standard props while maintaining thrust efficiency. Polycarbonate construction.

name: HorizonView FPV Goggles
shortDescription: Dual OLED FPV goggles with 1080p micro-displays and DVR recording.
description: Immersive dual 1080p OLED displays with 50ms low-latency digital HD feed. Built-in DVR, head tracking, and adjustable IPD. Includes carrying case.

name: SmartPilot Controller
shortDescription: Pro-grade controller with 5.5" display, haptic feedback, and 15km range.
description: Built-in 5.5-inch 1080p touchscreen, dual-band transmission for 15km range, customizable button mapping, and precision hall-effect gimbals.

name: Pro ND Filter Set
shortDescription: 6-piece ND filter set (ND4/8/16/32/64/CPL) for cinematic drone footage.
description: Multi-coated optical glass ND filters designed for SkyHawk and CineHawk series. Reduces shutter speed for natural motion blur in video.
specs: Filters: ND4, ND8, ND16, ND32, ND64, CPL

name: AeroShield Hard Case
shortDescription: Military-spec hard case with custom foam insert and waterproof seal.
description: IP67-rated polycarbonate shell with pressure equalization valve, custom-cut foam insert, and TSA-approved locks. Fits SkyHawk Pro X with all accessories.

name: AeroLand Pad Pro
shortDescription: 75cm double-sided landing pad with weighted edges and reflective markers.
description: High-visibility orange/blue landing pad with weighted edges for wind resistance. Reflective markers visible from 100m altitude. Folds to 30cm.

name: Explorer DIY Kit
shortDescription: Complete build-your-own 5" FPV drone kit with step-by-step video guide.
description: Everything you need to build your first FPV quad from scratch: frame, motors, ESC, FC, camera, VTX, receiver, battery, and charger. Includes 6-hour video build course.

name: Starter Kit Pro
shortDescription: Ready-to-fly starter bundle: CadetWing drone + controller + 3 batteries + case.
description: The perfect gift for aspiring pilots. Includes CadetWing Trainer drone, SmartPilot controller, 3 batteries for extended sessions, carrying case, and 30-day online pilot course.

name: Endurance 4S Camera Battery
shortDescription: High-capacity 4S 5000mAh intelligent battery for SkyHawk series.
description: Smart battery with built-in charge management, temperature monitoring, and remaining capacity display. Optimized for SkyHawk Pro X with 45-minute flight time.

name: ThermalEye 640 Camera Module
shortDescription: 640x512 thermal imaging camera module for TerraScout drones.
description: FLIR Lepton 3.5 thermal module with 640x512 resolution and radiometric temperature measurement. Detect heat signatures, water leaks, and electrical faults from altitude.

name: QuickCharge 6-Port Hub
shortDescription: Charge 6 batteries simultaneously with intelligent power distribution.
description: Smart charging hub with individual cell monitoring, storage charge mode, and firmware updates. Compatible with all AeroDrone battery types.

name: WindRider Long-Range
shortDescription: Long-range exploration drone with 20km range and 50-min flight time.
description: Built for exploration and mapping, the WindRider features dual-band 20km video link, 50-minute flight time, and 4K camera. Perfect for coastline surveys and mountain exploration.

name: Micro Whoop Indoor Kit
shortDescription: Tiny whoop indoor FPV kit with prop guards and HD camera.
description: Fly FPV indoors safely with ducted prop guards, HD camera, and lightweight 1S power system. Includes 4 batteries and USB charger.

name: DroneShield Signal Tracker
shortDescription: GPS tracker and signal booster for extended range operations.
description: Boost your control link range by 40% and track your drone in real-time via smartphone app. Built-in LTE backup for beyond-visual-line-of-sight recovery.

name: SurveyPro Mapping Software
shortDescription: Professional photogrammetry and 3D mapping software — 1-year license.
description: Process drone imagery into orthomosaics, 3D models, point clouds, and DSMs. Supports automated flight planning and NDVI analysis for agriculture.

name: Crossfire Long-Range RX
shortDescription: 915MHz long-range receiver for extreme distance FPV flights.
description: TBS Crossfire Nano RX with telemetry feedback, 100km+ range capability, and ultra-low latency for precision control at distance.

name: NightHawk LED System
shortDescription: FAA-compliant LED strobe and navigation light system for night flights.
description: Programmable RGB LED system with anti-collision strobes, orientation indicators, and remote control. Exceeds FAA Part 107 night flight requirements.

name: Advanced Racing Kit
shortDescription: Competition-ready FPV racing bundle: Phantom Racer + goggles + controller + batteries.
description: Everything a serious racer needs: Phantom Racer V2, HorizonView FPV Goggles, racing controller, 4x race batteries, charger, and tool kit. Ready for race day.
